title: 21 Dead, Dozens Injured as Bus Overturns in Udhampur; Rescue Operations Underway
description: At least 21 people were killed and several injured when a passenger bus overturned near Kagort village in Ramnagar, Udhampur district, Jammu and Kashmir. Rescue operations are underway, with critically injured passengers being airlifted. Union Minister Jitendra Singh confirmed immediate assistance and coordination with local authorities.
